programme.title: Road Trip
programme.desc: Tom Greens film debut casts him as a perpetual college student narrating the raucous odyssey of four university buddies as they make their way from Ithaca, N.Y., to Austin. Their goal: retrieve an illicit video, which was mailed by mistake. Breckin Meyer, Seann William Scott, Amy Smart, Paulo Costanzo, DJ Qualls, Rachel Blanchard.

programme.title: American Honey
programme.desc: A group of hard-living teenagers travel across the US, supporting themselves by selling magazines.

programme.title: Poltergeist
programme.desc: A young suburban girl is abducted by spirits that have besieged her familys home. Desperate, her parents devise a plan to rescue her from the other side.

programme.title: Leo Reich: Literally Who Cares?!
programme.desc: Leo Reich faces the swirling uncertainty of our collective future, asking the big questions. Treading the line between hilarious stand-up and humorless performance art, this special blends songs, anecdotes, and anxious non-sequiturs in a valiant attempt to raise awareness about important social and political causes or something.

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: In this take on the classic fairy tale, Prince Alcott falls in love with Snow White, which prompts the Evil Queen to cast her into exile. Snow White then allies herself with a gang of pint-sized thieves in order to win back the throne and her true love.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: Two turkeys travel back in time to the first Thanksgiving in order to change the traditional menu and save their kind from being served with a side of cranberry sauce.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two out-of-work ad executives with kids go into the babysitting business and find themselves banging heads with the headmistress of a pricey childrens academy.

programme.title: Nikki Glaser: Someday Youll Die
programme.desc: Taped in December 2023 in front of a sold-out audience at the Moore Theater in Seattle, Washington, Glaser dives into a wide range of topics including why she doesnt want kids, the harsh realities of aging, her sexual fantasies, and plans for her own death ? all in her hilarious, unapologetic, and brutally honest style.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: A 70-year-old widower comes out of retirement to take an internship at a trendy start-up fashion company, and unexpectedly becomes a confidant for the overwhelmed young CEO.

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds stars in this funny and refreshingly grown-up "romantic mystery" from writer-director Adam Brooks. Reynolds plays a jaded Manhattan ad exec who tells his 10-year-old daughter (Abigail Breslin) how he met her mother. Rachel Weisz, Elizabeth Banks, Isla Fisher.

programme.title: Paper Towns
programme.desc: A nerdy teenager falls for the enigmatic girl next door, who vanishes after the two have an adventure together one night. She leaves behind a trail of clues, which lead him and his friends to go on a road trip to find her.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love
programme.desc: A fictional romance between a struggling young playwright named Shakespeare and a noblewoman who longs to act, and who inspires him to write "Romeo and Juliet".

programme.title: Our Idiot Brother
programme.desc: An upbeat and unfailingly honest organic farmer turns to his sisters for help after his girlfriend leaves him, but soon after he moves in with each of them, he gets on their nerves with his naive ways. However, they eventually realise his optimism might actually be a strength.

programme.title: Spy
programme.desc: After years of doing work integral to the success of major missions, a deskbound CIA analyst is finally given the chance to go undercover in order to save her missing partner and thwart a global disaster.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: Mexican teenager Jaime Reyes returns home from college full of idealism and hope for his countrys future. But his home isnt as he left it. Dejected and without direction now that his dreams have been dashed, Jaime finds an ancient scarab that turns out to be an alien symbiote. When the scarab chooses him, Jaime becomes the third incarnation of the superhero, The Blue Beetle. This film is a superhero movie based on the DC comic of the same name.

programme.title: Bachelorette
programme.desc: A single woman puts her bitterness aside in order to serve as a bridesmaid at an old friends wedding and host the wildest hens night imaginable.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: More Feelings
programme.desc: Golden Globe-winning Egyptian American actor, writer, and comedian Ramy Youssef returns to the stage to offer his unique reflections on our divided world and more. Filmed at White Eagle Hall in Jersey City, the special sees Youssef delving into issues big and small, including the 2024 presidential election, the importance of prayer, and more.

programme.title: Thank You, Have A Nice Day
programme.desc: A food delivery worker rides anxiously through the streets of New York City, but one of his deliveries turns out to be a very bitter surprise.

programme.title: Road Trip: Beer Pong
programme.desc: This hilarious, politically incorrect comedy finds Andy (Preston Jones) and two college buddies hatching a plan to enter the national beer-pong championships, but getting there requires a cross-county road trip with sexy models. Directed by Steve Rash. D.J. Qualls.

programme.title: Dream Scenario
programme.desc: The narrative follows a very unkempt professor named Paul Matthews. His life is quite uneventful until suddenly, his image appears in peoples dreams. Soon, millions of strangers find themselves dreaming about him. The event made him an overnight sensation. However, things change when these dreams soon become nightmares for some and, later, for many.

programme.title: Now You See Me
programme.desc: A group of magicians called "The Four Horsemen" raise the awareness of an FBI agent when their performances include brazen heists of corrupt businessmen, the proceeds from which they share with their audiences.

programme.title: Leo Reich: Literally Who Cares?!
programme.desc: Leo Reich faces the swirling uncertainty of our collective future, asking the big questions. Treading the line between hilarious stand-up and humorless performance art, this special blends songs, anecdotes, and anxious non-sequiturs in a valiant attempt to raise awareness about important social and political causes or something.

programme.title: Everybody Wants to Be Italian
programme.desc: Jay Jablonski gives a primo performance as a Polish-American seafood-store owner, "a romantic fool" who pretends to be Italian to woo a Boston veterinarian whom he mistakenly believes to be of that ethnicity, when she is actually Spanish. Cerina Vincent is an engaging delight as the object of his desire, and Penny Marshall is a hoot as an opinionated florist. Written and directed by Jason Todd Ipson. Richard Libertini, John Kapelos, Marisa Petroro.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Framed for a crime they didnt commit, four ex-Special Forces operatives fight to expose the truth and clear their names.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: Misfits try to lift the Cleveland Indians out of a 34-year slump.

programme.title: Welcome Home Roscoe Jenkins
programme.desc: Martin Lawrence stars in this uproarious farce about a successful self-help guru and TV talk-show host who finds himself embroiled in a series of comic disasters when he goes home to Georgia for his parents 50th wedding anniversary. James Earl Jones, Margaret Avery, Joy Bryant, Cedric the Entertainer. Written and directed by Malcolm D. Lee.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: A tyrannical fashion-magazine editor makes life hell for her new assistant in this adaptation of the best-selling novel by Lauren Weisberger.

programme.title: The Brothers
programme.desc: Comedy-drama about four friends who ponder love, marriage and interracial dating.

programme.title: Dear White People
programme.desc: A biracial student hosts a controversial radio show that sparks an epic media frenzy at a predominately white university. Later elected president of an all-black residential hall, she becomes the subject of a racially charged reality program.

programme.title: Dicks: The Musical
programme.desc: Two self-obsessed businessmen discover theyre long-lost identical twins and come together to plot the reunion of their eccentric divorced parents.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: Newlywed Ted wants to become a father, but must prove hes a person in a court of law first.

programme.title: Dope
programme.desc: A geeky high-school student hopes to get into a prestigious university and leave his rough neighbourhood behind. However, his promising future is put in jeopardy when he attends a drug dealers birthday party and gets caught up in a deal gone wrong.

programme.title: While Were Young
programme.desc: A childless, fortysomething New York couple befriend two young hipsters. The older pair enjoy the idea of feeling young again, but their cross-generational friendship eventually sours.

programme.title: Fever Pitch
programme.desc: A comedic grand slam detailing a couple whose romance is threatened by an obsession with the Boston Red Sox.

programme.title: The Peanuts Movie
programme.desc: Charlie Brown, Lucy, Linus and friends embark on an epic adventure while Snoopy tracks down the Red Baron, his nemesis.

programme.title: Legally Blondes
programme.desc: Camilla Rosso and Rebecca Rosso star as Elle Woods British twin cousins in this wildly hilarious spin-off of "Legally Blonde." The girls move to Los Angeles to attend high school, where they quickly learn that in order to succeed they will need to prove that blondes not only have more fun, but have more smarts as well.

programme.title: Uptown Girls
programme.desc: After losing her inheritance, a socialite works as a nanny to a precocious 8-year-old.

programme.title: Man of the House
programme.desc: A no-nonsense Texas Ranger is assigned to protect cheerleaders who witnessed a murder.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: The Flash sequel follows Barry Allen on time-bending adventures that alter the course of history. Harnessing his super speed to travel back in time and save his family, Allen believes he is making the world a better place. He soon discovers that his mission leads to the creation of a multiverse where General Zod is on the rise and there are no superheroes to fight him. Allen must navigate the multiverse to find Batman and convince him to save the world.

programme.title: Me and Earl and the Dying Girl
programme.desc: A misfit teenager forms an unlikely friendship with a female classmate who has leukemia. As they grow closer, she helps him with his creative endeavours and forces him to confront the messiness of real life.

programme.title: Road Trip
programme.desc: Tom Greens film debut casts him as a perpetual college student narrating the raucous odyssey of four university buddies as they make their way from Ithaca, N.Y., to Austin. Their goal: retrieve an illicit video, which was mailed by mistake. Breckin Meyer, Seann William Scott, Amy Smart, Paulo Costanzo, DJ Qualls, Rachel Blanchard.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: A lovelorn composer flies to a Hawaiian resort in hopes of forgetting the woman who broke his heart, only to discover she and her new boyfriend have just checked in.

programme.title: Ride Along 2
programme.desc: Friction continues between an aspiring cop and his seasoned partner (and future brother-in-law) as they pursue a Miami drug lord together with the help of a savvy detective.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: A mother-daughter team of con artists targets wealthy men for their fortunes.

programme.title: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Always unlucky in love, Kate takes a job as a department store elf during the Christmas season, only to find her life changed by the charming Tom.

programme.title: Bachelorette
programme.desc: A single woman puts her bitterness aside in order to serve as a bridesmaid at an old friends wedding and host the wildest hens night imaginable.

programme.title: Free Fire
programme.desc: An arms deal between two Irishmen and a gang goes awry in 1970s Boston.

programme.title: Austenland
programme.desc: A single, thirty-something woman whos obsessed with Jane Austen takes a holiday at a resort based on the authors works, and falls in love with a dashing young servant.

programme.title: Dr. Strangelove Or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb
programme.desc: Stanley Kubricks brilliant "nightmare comedy" about a nuclear crisis precipitated by a paranoid general.

programme.title: Down to Earth
programme.desc: A heavenly mix-up causes the untimely death of a black comic, who returns to Earth as a rich---and white---old-timer.

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds stars in this funny and refreshingly grown-up "romantic mystery" from writer-director Adam Brooks. Reynolds plays a jaded Manhattan ad exec who tells his 10-year-old daughter (Abigail Breslin) how he met her mother. Rachel Weisz, Elizabeth Banks, Isla Fisher.

programme.title: Real Women Have Curves
programme.desc: An 18-year-old Mexican-American clashes with her traditional mother over her future.

programme.title: Starter for 10
programme.desc: Engaging charmer following an intelligent and witty working-class bloke (the wonderful James McAvoy) as he rubs elbows (and elbow patches) in 1985 with tweedy snobs at elite University of Bristol, where he searches for love and enlightenment. Rebecca Hall is delightful as a campus rabble rouser and Alice Eve is equally impressive as a brainy blonde for whom he falls. Director Tom Vaughan and screenwriter David Nicholls are both graduates of the same school depicted in the film.

programme.title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
programme.desc: Superman and Batman clash in this superhero movie.

programme.title: Zookeeper
programme.desc: Lonely zookeeper Griffin Keyes decides to quit his job and dive into the dating pool, but he gets a big surprise when his animal friends reveal they can talk and start offering romantic advice so he will find a mate and stick around.

programme.title: Bill and Teds Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Two dim best friends who dream of being famous rock stars time-travel in order to bring ancient figures to modern times so that they can pass a history class and graduate.

programme.title: Bill and Teds Bogus Journey
programme.desc: Sequel with the ditsy dudes battling evil robot copies of themselves.

programme.title: Inkheart
programme.desc: A father and daughter who have the ability to bring fictional book characters to life battle a fairytale villain who wants to use their powers for his own evil doings.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A journalist becomes infatuated with a widower and single father when she hears him on a radio call-in show discussing and lamenting his late lost love.

programme.title: Flipped
programme.desc: Mischievous schoolboy Bryce realises that the girl he has struggled to avoid may be his one true love. Over the course of six years, Juli pines for Bryce, who does everything in his power to put her off. Later, as the pair enter high school, Bryce discovers girls and realises his true feelings for Juli.

programme.title: Still Alice
programme.desc: Linguistics professor Alice Howland finds her relationships with her husband and three children tested when she is diagnosed with early-onset Alzheimers disease.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: Reese Witherspoon is hilarious in this charmer about a ditzy L.A. sorority sister named Elle. She goes to Harvard Law School in an effort to win back her boyfriend and struggles to fit in among the snobs and intellectuals. But Elle soon discovers that she just might have what it takes to be a good lawyer. Luke Wilson, Selma Blair, Victor Garber, Holland Taylor.

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White and Blonde
programme.desc: Reese Witherspoon shines as perpetually perky lawyer Elle Woods in this delightful sequel. When Elle discovers that her dogs mother is a victim of laboratory testing, she tries to persuade a congresswoman to back an animal-rights bill.

programme.title: Legally Blondes
programme.desc: Camilla Rosso and Rebecca Rosso star as Elle Woods British twin cousins in this wildly hilarious spin-off of "Legally Blonde." The girls move to Los Angeles to attend high school, where they quickly learn that in order to succeed they will need to prove that blondes not only have more fun, but have more smarts as well.

programme.title: Uptown Girls
programme.desc: After losing her inheritance, a socialite works as a nanny to a precocious 8-year-old.

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: Amanda Bynes ("Hairspray") stars as a tomboy college freshman who clashes with a wicked sorority queen and befriends seven dorky outcasts in this delightfully sassy teen twist on Snow White. Directed by Joe Nussbaum.

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The spy spoof series gets the big screen treatment with this action comedy.

programme.title: X-Men Origins: Wolverine
programme.desc: Hugh Jackman once again takes on the role of Wolverine in this prequel to the popular "X-Men" movie series. This origin story explains how Wolverine discovered his unique powers and the mysterious circumstances behind his retractable metal claws.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs: The Revenge of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: Feline spy Kitty Galore plots to conquer the world and finally gain the upper paw over her rivals. In order to fight this unforeseen threat, dogs and cats must band together to save both themselves and their humans.

programme.title: El Perro y el Gato
programme.desc: An energetic dog and a laid-back cat teach pre-schoolers vocabulary in both English and Spanish.

programme.title: Stand Up and Shout: Songs From a Philly High School
programme.desc: The film follows 10th graders from a Philadelphia public school, who take part in a unique songwriting collaboration. Working in teams with local musicians, students come together to create an album of powerful original songs that capture both the challenging times theyre living in and the joy that music brings. Back in the classroom after two years of pandemic isolation, the teenagers find a way to express their experiences and feelings in stirring songs that come straight from the heart.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: "Malcolm in the Middle" star Frankie Muniz is the center of attention in this breezy adventure-comedy about a teen CIA operative. His character is handpicked to thwart a world-domination plot, but must first overcome his shyness around girls! Hilary Duff costars as the object of Codys awkward affection.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London
programme.desc: In England, the teen super-spy poses as a music prodigy to thwart a renegade agents plot to take over the world with a mind-control device.

programme.title: Robots
programme.desc: A small-town robot goes to the big city to be an inventor.

programme.title: Zookeeper
programme.desc: Lonely zookeeper Griffin Keyes decides to quit his job and dive into the dating pool, but he gets a big surprise when his animal friends reveal they can talk and start offering romantic advice so he will find a mate and stick around.

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
programme.desc: The first big-screen adventure of the popular childrens (and adults) cartoon series follows SpongeBob as he sets out to retrieve King Neptunes stolen crown, save Mr. Krabs, who has been accused of the theft, and stymie Plankton and his plot for world domination.

programme.title: Marmaduke
programme.desc: A super-size Great Dane named Marmaduke, whos prone to making messes, moves with his loving family to California, where he suffers from culture shock and tries to win the heart of a female canine.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: Reese Witherspoon is hilarious in this charmer about a ditzy L.A. sorority sister named Elle. She goes to Harvard Law School in an effort to win back her boyfriend and struggles to fit in among the snobs and intellectuals. But Elle soon discovers that she just might have what it takes to be a good lawyer. Luke Wilson, Selma Blair, Victor Garber, Holland Taylor.

programme.title: The Water Horse: Legend of the Deep
programme.desc: A lonely young Scottish boy finds an egg on the shores of Loch Ness that hatches and grows into the mammoth, mythical "water horse" of Scottish lore.

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: In this take on the classic fairy tale, Prince Alcott falls in love with Snow White, which prompts the Evil Queen to cast her into exile. Snow White then allies herself with a gang of pint-sized thieves in order to win back the throne and her true love.

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: Living in the perfect Barbieland, Barbie and Ken lead a carefree existence, but soon, Ken finds himself questioning his simple life. Enamored by the human world, he convinces Barbie to leave their comfort zone and take a trip outside Barbieland. Soon, the Mattel CEO feels threatened by the duos daring decision and pursues them to guide them back to where they belong.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: John Cusack and Kate Beckinsale decide to let fate be their guide in this charming comedy about a man and woman who share an undeniable attraction when they meet, but concoct a series of experiments to determine if they are truly meant for each other. Jeremy Piven, Molly Shannon, John Corbett, Bridget Moynahan, Eugene Levy.

programme.title: Mothers Day
programme.desc: A star-studded ensemble comedy about intertwining stories tied to Mothers Day.

programme.title: Mike Wallace Is Here
programme.desc: Mike Wallace Is Here recounts the career of Mike Wallace, an American journalist best known the program 60 minutes and for his confrontational and unnerving questions for politicians, business power players, and celebrities. The documentary follows Wallace from his beginnings as a game show host to his first interview program, Night Beat. After his sons death in 1962, Wallace decides to become a serious reporter, and a few years later, his magnum opus, 60 Minutes, is born.

programme.title: Kart Racer
programme.desc: Randy Quaid and Will Rothhaar star in this touching family drama about a troubled teen and his estranged dad who bond over go-kart racing. David Gallagher.

programme.title: El Perro y el Gato
programme.desc: An energetic dog and a laid-back cat teach pre-schoolers vocabulary in both English and Spanish.

programme.title: Classical Baby
programme.desc: Part of a two-part episode featuring lullabies from around world. Performers include Bola de Nieve; Miriam Makeba; Paul McCartney; and Corinne Bailey Rae.

programme.title: How to Eat Fried Worms
programme.desc: Excellent coming-of-age fare about a new kid (Luke Benward) in school who may have bitten off more than he can chew when he bets the school bully (Adam Hicks) that he can swallow 10 creepy crawlies. Written and directed by Bob Dolman, who adapted the 1973 Thomas Rockwell kid-lit best seller, which received an animated TV treatment in 1985. Hallie Kate Eisenberg, Tom Cavanagh, Kimberly Williams-Paisley, James Rebhorn.

programme.title: Bill and Teds Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Two dim best friends who dream of being famous rock stars time-travel in order to bring ancient figures to modern times so that they can pass a history class and graduate.

programme.title: Bill and Teds Bogus Journey
programme.desc: Sequel with the ditsy dudes battling evil robot copies of themselves.

programme.title: The Water Horse: Legend of the Deep
programme.desc: A lonely young Scottish boy finds an egg on the shores of Loch Ness that hatches and grows into the mammoth, mythical "water horse" of Scottish lore.

programme.title: How to Dance in Ohio
programme.desc: Autistic teens and young adults in Columbus prepare for a spring formal by attending social therapy sessions, where they confront their fears and try to grow more comfortable with all aspects of their big night, from becoming familiar with the layout of the venue to looking someone in the eye to ask them out on a date.

programme.title: Zookeeper
programme.desc: Lonely zookeeper Griffin Keyes decides to quit his job and dive into the dating pool, but he gets a big surprise when his animal friends reveal they can talk and start offering romantic advice so he will find a mate and stick around.

programme.title: Tyler Perrys The Family That Preys
programme.desc: Scandal rocks two families with a lengthy history, one upper-class, the other working class, and each led by strong-willed matriarchs who are long-time friends.

programme.title: Austenland
programme.desc: A single, thirty-something woman whos obsessed with Jane Austen takes a holiday at a resort based on the authors works, and falls in love with a dashing young servant.

programme.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
programme.desc: The long-awaited sequel to the epic science fiction megahit Avatar, continuing the story of Jake Sullys adventures on Pandora.

programme.title: WarGames
programme.desc: John Badhams thriller about a high-schooler whose home computer gains access to the US missile-warning system.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: This fantasy musical film follows the story of Willy Wonka, the famous but eccentric chocolatier based on the character from Roald Dahls novel. In particular, it emphasizes his rise to the top. The narrative traces his beginnings as a young adult who started as an employee selling chocolate in a store until he became driven to enter the chocolate industry eventually. This film acts as a prequel to the 1971 film adaptation of Dahls novel.

programme.title: Everest
programme.desc: In this adventure docudrama set in 1996, several groups of climbers successfully scale Mount Everest, only to be faced with tragedy when a monster snowstorm surprises them as they attempt to make their descent.

programme.title: Kart Racer
programme.desc: Randy Quaid and Will Rothhaar star in this touching family drama about a troubled teen and his estranged dad who bond over go-kart racing. David Gallagher.

programme.title: David McCullough: Painting With Words
programme.desc: A profile of Pulitzer Prize-winning author David McCullough ("John Adams") follows him to speaking engagements, reveals inspirations for his books, examines his personal interests outside writing and visits his workplace at home. Produced by Tom Hanks and Gary Goetzman.

programme.title: Ramona and Beezus
programme.desc: Based on Beverly Clearys best-selling childrens novels, this charming film follows the adventures of a mischievous young girl named Ramona Quimby (Joey King) as she annoys her older sister (Selena Gomez) and attempts to save her familys home.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: "Malcolm in the Middle" star Frankie Muniz is the center of attention in this breezy adventure-comedy about a teen CIA operative. His character is handpicked to thwart a world-domination plot, but must first overcome his shyness around girls! Hilary Duff costars as the object of Codys awkward affection.

programme.title: Minari
programme.desc: A Korean American family relocates to a small farm in Arkansas in the 1980s ? to pursue their own version of the American Dream. The arrival of their irreverent grandmother disrupts the balance they try to maintain between cultural assimilation and autonomy.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Determined to avenge his family, Paul Atreides joins the Fremen to build a strong war force in preparation for his battle against the Harkonnens. He must navigate the dangerous planet and harness the power of the spice. Fulfilling his destiny as the Kwisatz Haderach, his powers grow, and he becomes more confident in leading the world to the freedom they deserve. The sequel to the 2021 film chronicles the rise of Paul Atreides as a leader and hero.

programme.title: The Bling Ring
programme.desc: A group of Los Angeles teens rob the homes of the rich and famous, but their criminal pastime turns treacherous as their obsession with luxury goods grows all-consuming.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: The musical remake centers on the struggles of Celie and Nettie Harris, two African American sisters living in Georgia in the 1900s. Enduring abuse by their father, the sisters dream of escaping their miserable life. After Celie forcibly marries a man named Albert Johnson, Nettie seeks refuge in their new home. When Albert assaults Nettie, she runs away and loses touch with Celie. What follows is a decades-spanning odyssey showcasing the willpower of two women trying to forge their own paths.

programme.title: The Lionheart
programme.desc: In 2011, two-time Indianapolis 500 champion Dan Wheldon died in a horrific crash at the Las Vegas Motor Speedway, shaking the world of motorsports to its core. Ten years later, Dans two sons, Sebastian and Oliver, follow in their fathers footsteps as they work through their loss the only way they know how by getting behind the wheel to race.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: Martial-arts action is combined with a touching love story in this Best Foreign Language Film winner about a stolen magical sword in ancient China.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: A meek young woman emigrates from Ireland to New York City in the 1950s, and finds her heart torn between a magnetic Italian suitor and a charming lad back home.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary
programme.desc: The romantic adventures of a thirtysomething Brit determined to find Mr Right while cutting back on her smoking, drinking and eating.

programme.title: The Women
programme.desc: Polished and incisive remake of the 1939 classic about a sisterhood of well-to-do New Yorkers who rally around their friend (Meg Ryan) when they learn her husband is having an affair. As in the original, the film features an all-female cast, including Annette Bening, Jada Pinkett Smith, Eva Mendes and Debra Messing. Written and directed by TV veteran Diane English, who based her script on the 1936 play by Clare Boothe Luce. Rolling Stone Mick Jagger is one of the producers.

programme.title: Juliet, Naked
programme.desc: Annie feels stuck in her relationship with Duncan, who obsessively runs a fan site dedicated to reclusive indie rocker Tucker Crowe. After she posts a scathing review of Crowes latest release to Duncans site, Crowe himself emails her and they begin corresponding. When he requests to meet her, both she and Duncan must confront the real man behind the pop culture icon thats influenced their lives.

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: King George goes on an unsuccessful date. Jeff struggles to thwart Louies bid for the crown. Darla Smith, a former elephant trainer, enters the fray with an agenda of her own.

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: Jeff gains the upper hand over Louie. Darlas promotion to co-General Manager leads to disastrous consequences, for both Jeff and herself. George finally lands on the only successor he can trust.

programme.title: The Great Lillian Hall
programme.desc: As beloved Broadway star Lillian Hall pours her heart, soul, and time into preparing for her next big role, she finds herself blindsided by confusion and forgetfulness. Battling against all odds to make it to opening night, while holding on to her fading memories and identity, she must navigate a tumultuous emotional journey ? balancing her desire for the spotlight and the stark demands of the real world.

programme.title: MoviePass, MovieCrash
programme.desc: In a span of eight years, MoviePass went from being the fastest growing subscription service since Spotify to total bankruptcy, losing over $150 million in 2017 alone. This documentary chronicles the companys beginnings as an innovative movie ticketing model beloved by cinema goers, exploring the visionary mission of its entrepreneur co-founders, its impressive early successes, and its precipitous downfall caused by mismanagement and corporate greed.

programme.title: Sam Jay: Salute Me or Shoot Me
programme.desc: Comedian and writer Sam Jay takes the stage at Brooklyn Steel for a hilariously frank discussion on embracing our differences, the stresses of long-term relationships, and the power of empathy. Newly engaged, Jay gets candid about life with her future wife and the unknown stresses of being "the man," the grim reality of trash day, and more.

programme.title: Notes on a Scandal
programme.desc: A spinster school teacher discovers that a younger colleague is having an affair with a teenage student.

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Set in the early 1970s, this biopic stars Denzel Washington as real-life New York City drug kingpin Frank Lucas, and Russell Crowe as the cop sworn to bring him down.

programme.title: Trainwreck
programme.desc: In this raunchy yet heartfelt comedy, a commitment-phobic binge drinker living in New York City must reevaluate her feelings about intimate relationships when a sports doctor pursues a romance with her. Meanwhile, she must make some hard decisions about her ailing fathers long-term care. Unrated version.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Thriller about divers battling sharks and criminals after discovering treasure and a crashed plane loaded with drugs.

programme.title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
programme.desc: Ordinary teen Billy Batson possesses the ability to transform into a superhero alter ego with just a single word. As Batson continues to hone his crimefighting skills and tackle new challenges, he faces a threat that puts his life in jeopardy. The sequel to the 2019 film.

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: Set in the year 2018, John Connor leads the human resistance against the computer network Skynet as the machines grow more aggressive than ever before. John was raised to believe in a specific version of the future, but that future begins to shift with the appearance of mysterious former death-row inmate Marcus Wright. As John and Marcus venture into the mechanical heart of Skynets operations, they make a terrifying discovery about the potential fate of the human race.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: More Feelings
programme.desc: Golden Globe-winning Egyptian American actor, writer, and comedian Ramy Youssef returns to the stage to offer his unique reflections on our divided world and more. Filmed at White Eagle Hall in Jersey City, the special sees Youssef delving into issues big and small, including the 2024 presidential election, the importance of prayer, and more.

programme.title: San Andreas
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot races to rescue his estranged daughter after a massive earthquake devastates California.

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: Dominic Toretto and his tight-knit gang of street racers must battle the brother of a defeated nemesis and rescue a software genius from terrorists. The film is dedicated to series regular Paul Walker, who died halfway through production.

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: King George goes on an unsuccessful date. Jeff struggles to thwart Louies bid for the crown. Darla Smith, a former elephant trainer, enters the fray with an agenda of her own.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: The story revolves around an office worker who learns that his father is a professional assassin and that he shares his fathers killing abilities.

programme.title: Shattered
programme.desc: Following a car wreck, an amnesiac tries to piece together his past.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: Tom Clancys thriller about a Soviet commander heading for the US coast in a missile-laden submarine.

programme.desc: Filmed live in LA, this immersive experience sees the Queen of Pop perform iconic tracks for an audience of over 50,000 Little Monsters.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: A scientist teams with a mysterious French agent to try to stop a massive, radioactive lizard from destroying Manhattan.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: Twenty-two years after Jurassic Park opened on Isla Nubar, a dinosaur-themed resort attracts thousands of visitors each year, just as John Hammond envisioned. However, following a bad sag in turnout a new effort is undertaken to revitalise Jurassic World, but once again mankinds attempts to interfere with nature bring ominous results.

programme.desc: A washed-up American actor experiences culture shock while filming a whiskey commercial in Tokyo, but finds solace in his connection with a married 20-something whose successful photographer husband is in the city on an assignment. As the unlikely pair explores Tokyo, they begin to wonder if their sudden friendship might be growing into something more.

programme.desc: Drama centred on the tragic shooting of Oscar Grant, a 22-year-old father who was gunned down by a railway officer in San Francisco on New Years Day in 2009, and whose murder shocked the US after being captured on camera by his fellow passengers.

programme.title: All the Way
programme.desc: The story of the early days of Lyndon B Johnsons presidency, from the assassination of John F Kennedy to the battle over the Civil Rights Act of 1964 and his campaign to stay in the White House.

programme.title: Greta
programme.desc: A cheerful teenager finds herself in the clutches of a deranged and dangerous French widow. She befriends the latter after returning her handbag, but eventually discovers that her maternal charms and desire for companionship are a front for sinister machinations.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: This biopic uses the format of a faux documentary to trace the rise and fall of figure skater Tonya Harding, whose career comes crashing down when her ex-husband orchestrates an attack on rival skater Nancy Kerrigan.

programme.title: Priscilla
programme.desc: After bumping into Elvis Presley at a party, teenager Priscilla Beaulieu becomes enamored with the musical icon. Their courtship and consequent marriage change Priscillas life. What follows is a tantalizing, turbulent journey of love and fame. Based on the true story of the Presley family, the drama film chronicles Priscillas relationship with Elvis Presley.

programme.title: Paper Towns
programme.desc: A nerdy teenager falls for the enigmatic girl next door, who vanishes after the two have an adventure together one night. She leaves behind a trail of clues, which lead him and his friends to go on a road trip to find her.
When Adam is diagnosed with cancer and given a 50-percent chance of survival, his friend Kyle works to keep his spirits up.

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: A smooth-talking high-school student falls for a straight-arrow good girl and finds adjusting to more of an adult life more complicated than he expected.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: The musical remake centers on the struggles of Celie and Nettie Harris, two African American sisters living in Georgia in the 1900s. Enduring abuse by their father, the sisters dream of escaping their miserable life. After Celie forcibly marries a man named Albert Johnson, Nettie seeks refuge in their new home. When Albert assaults Nettie, she runs away and loses touch with Celie. What follows is a decades-spanning odyssey showcasing the willpower of two women trying to forge their own paths.

programme.title: 20th Century Women
programme.desc: In 1979, a single mother and boardinghouse landlord decides that the best way she can parent her teenage son is to enlist her young tenants?a quirky punk photographer, a mellow handyman and her sons shrewd but troubled best friend?to serve as his role models in a rapidly changing world.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: This comedy-drama film is inspired by the Twitter thread that went viral in 2015. Tweeting under her account handle @_zolarmoon, Zola tweets about meeting a sex worker named Stefani and how their immediate friendship led to a strange road trip. The women aim to reach Florida and earn money by dancing in various strip clubs. However, they run into several mishaps and misadventures as they travel with Stefanis male companions: her boyfriend Derrek and her pimp named X.

programme.title: Moonage Daydream

The resulting film features narration in Bowies own voice as the story presents how he crafted his multidisciplinary artistry.
